chunks.text: SM/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No. D-2713 of 2021 Abdul Sattar Tunio others Versus Province of Sindh and others ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- BEFORE: Justice Irfan Saadat Khan, Justice Arshad Hussain Khan,JJ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.11735/2021 (Exp/App) 3. For hearing of CMA No.11736/2021 (stay) 4. For hearing of main case. --------- 27.10.2021 Malik Altaf Hussain, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Safdar Deepar, A.A.G. Sindh. -.----.---.- Irfan Saadat Khan,J. This petition has been filed on the ground that even after passage of substantial time DPC has not been convened by the Respondents. It is submitted that though DPC was convened in the year 2020 but the name of the petitioner was not included in the list placed before the DPC in the said year which has caused serious prejudice to the petitioner. Learned A.A.G., stated that if petitioner fulfills the criteria of the promotion his name definitely would be included in the list which is to be placed before the DPC in the forthcoming meeting. The counsel for the petitioner is satisfied with this statement of the AAG and does not press the instant petition any further, which stands disposed of as not pressed, along with the pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE SM
